characters.description: Adam Childe© BBCAboutPortrayed byMatthew AshfordeIntroduced byDiederick Santer(2007)GenderMaleAppears on8 January 2007Duration2007Episode Count1StatusAliveOccupationSolicitorClassificationFormer; guestResearchPage Links:Which Pages Link HereAdam Childeis a duty solicitor. He made his only appearance on8 January 2007. He was portrayed byMatthew Ashforde.  Adam is assigned to representSonia Fowler, when she is arrested on suspicion of the murder of her former mother-in-law,Pauline Fowler. He is nervous, and Sonia is relieved whenPhil Mitchellpays forRitchie Scottto represent her instead of Adam.

characters.description: Adam Gorman© BBCAboutPortrayed byIan Gelder (search)Introduced byDominic Treadwell-Collins(2016)GenderMaleFirst Appearance10 May 2016Last Appearance12 May 2016Duration2016Episode Count2StatusAliveOccupationDoctorClassificationFormer; guestResearchPage Links:Which Pages Link HereDoctor Adam GormanisPeggy Mitchell's former doctor. He made his first appearance on10 May 2016and last on12 May 2016. He was portrayed by Ian Gelder.  Adam tellsPeggy Mitchellthat her cancer has spread to her brain and any further treatment will only delay her death for a few months, but would have considerable side-effects, urging her to consider if she wants to stop any further treatment.

Adam works withLee Carterin the Army Recurrent Office, he arrives inWalfordlooking for Lee atThe Queen Victoria.Linda Carterinforms him Lee has already left for work and Adam replies he must a swap a shift with one of the other lads.Nancy Carterasks him why he wants to speak to Lee but he says its nothing.

characters.name: Adam White
characters.description: Adam White© BBCAboutPortrayed byBen WigzellIntroduced byLorraine Newman(2012,2013)Dominic Treadwell-Collins(2014)GenderMaleFirst Appearance17 December 2012Last Appearance17 March 2014Cause/ReasonWarned off returning toWalfordbyRonnie MitchellDuration2012,2013,2014Episode Count9AddressEast LondonStatusAliveOccupationCriminalClassificationFormer; guestRelationships/Known relativesMotherNora WhiteBrothersCarl White(deceased)ResearchGalleryGalleryPage Links:Which Pages Link HereAdam Whiteis the younger brother ofCarl White. He made his first appearance on17 December 2012and last on17 March 2014. He is portrayed byBen Wigzell.  Adam is one of a group of men who give Carl's former prison cellmate,Derek Branning, a beating after running his car off the road and chasing him, in an attempt to track downMax Branning, after Max had married his brothers, Carl's, ex-fiancée,Kirsty Branning. InFebruary 2013, Max goes to Adam's house in an attempt to find Kirsty. When Max does see Kirsty, she has bruises on her neck, which are caused by Adam, as a result, Max punches Adam. Adam and his associate then beat Max, while locking him in the house. InMay, Kirsty receives calls from Adam who informs her that Carl is to be released from prison. Max later returns to Adam's house with his brother,Jack Branning, and Adam punches them both, and orders them to stop contacting Kirsty. InAugust, Adam attacks Kirsty, and asks her for money. Carl stops Adam, who did not expect his brother to be behind the attack. Carl then decides to blame Adam for Kirsty's marriage to Max and their mother,Nora White, being in a care home. Carl and Adam go toR&R, where Carl plans to sell drugs at the nightclub, but are confronted by Max and the club's owner,Phil Mitchell. Carl later disowns Adam.

characters.name: Adrian Bell
characters.description: Adrian Bell© BBCAboutPortrayed byJoseph MarcellIntroduced byLeonard Lewis(1992)GenderMaleFirst Appearance4 August 1992Last Appearance6 August 1992Cause/ReasonLeft after finishing his repair job onThe Queen VictoriaDuration1992Episode Count2StatusAliveOccupationCarpenterClassificationFormer; guestResearchPage Links:Which Pages Link HereAdrian Bellmade his first appearance on4 August 1992and last on6 August 1992. He was portrayed byJoseph Marcell.  A skilled carpenter and acquaintance ofGrant Mitchell, Adrian arrived inWalfordto carry out furniture repairs atThe Queen Victoriapub. His work quickly drew attention, particularly fromFrank Butcher, who was impressed by Adrian's craftsmanship and considered hiring him to build an office forPat Butcher's cab firm.

characters.name: Adrian Harding
characters.description: Adrian Harding© BBCAboutPortrayed byTerence Harvey (search)Introduced byJane Harris(1997)GenderMaleFirst Appearance15 December 1997Last Appearance5 January 1998Duration1997-1998Episode Count3StatusAliveOccupationBarristerClassificationFormer; guestResearchPage Links:Which Pages Link HereAdrian Hardingis a barrister. He made his first appearance on15 December 1997and last on5 January 1998. He was portrayed by Terence Harvey.  Adrian is a barrister whoNick Hollandhires to help his fiancée,Cindy Beale, get custody of her children,Steven,Lucy, andPeter Beale, but he fires him when Adrian advises that Cindy should plead guilty for the abduction of her children.
